prompt: Are any of the $10 tickets worth buying today or should I just save my money?
assertions: Restricts the analysis to $10 ticket games only.
Ends with a clear recommendation: either a specific $10 game buy or the exact phrase 'save your money today.'
Includes per-game metrics and summary stats for the $10-only analysis.
Does not fabricate results if live data cannot be fetched or parsed.
